summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Shop Preview Feature (P1) and related functionality. All features working correctly - preview costs 10 coins, lasts 2.5 minutes with countdown timer, and sector shops work properly.
passed_tests: Backend: User registration/login - PASSED (fixed _id serialization bug)
Backend: Shop items endpoint for all sectors (main, chores, fitness, etc.) - PASSED
Backend: Preview endpoint costs 10 coins - PASSED
Backend: Preview duration 150 seconds (2.5 min) - PASSED
Backend: Get active previews endpoint - PASSED
Backend: Re-preview doesn't charge again - PASSED
Backend: Preview fails with insufficient coins - PASSED
Backend: Chore activity logging earns XP/coins - PASSED
Backend: User stats update correctly - PASSED
Frontend: Registration flow - PASSED
Frontend: Dashboard displays XP, coins, level, streak - PASSED
Frontend: Chores sector logs activities correctly - PASSED
Frontend: Chores shop shows items with Preview buttons - PASSED
Frontend: Preview button shows '(10 coins)' cost - PASSED
Frontend: Preview button shows '(10 Chores coins)' in sector shops - PASSED
Frontend: Preview modal opens with countdown timer - PASSED
Frontend: Preview timer counts down from 2:30 - PASSED
Frontend: Toast notification 'Preview started! You have 2.5 minutes...' - PASSED
Frontend: Active preview button shows 'Preview Active: X:XX' in green - PASSED
Frontend: Main Shop preview uses main coins - PASSED

seed_data_creation: Created multiple test users during testing, logged activities to earn coins
context_for_next_testing_agent: Shop Preview feature is fully implemented and working. Preview costs 10 coins (sector-specific or main coins), lasts 150 seconds (2.5 minutes), shows countdown timer. Fixed MongoDB ObjectId serialization bug in /auth/register endpoint. All 17 backend tests pass.

bugs_fixed.issue: Registration endpoint returning 500 error due to MongoDB ObjectId serialization
bugs_fixed.fix: Excluded '_id' from user_response dict in register endpoint
